# Type

**Data field**

A 32-bit integer that identifies the atom type.

## Overview

This field must be set to `'cdat'`.



## Data fields

- **Size**: A 32-bit integer that specifies the number of bytes in this closed captioning media data atom.
- **Sample data**: An array of one or more byte pairs for data channel 1/field 1 (“CC1”) of a CEA-608 data stream, each byte pair corresponding to a video frame.
